name: python-hover
description: Instant Python documentation on hover. Covers 300+ constructs, all keywords/operators with correct anchors, NumPy, Pandas, FastAPI, Django, PyTorch, Flask, Pydantic, SQLAlchemy, Requests and more. Scoped DevDocs links, smart context detection, zero config.

python-hover.runtimeHelper.markdownDescription: Run the persistent Python helper for runtime introspection, keyword help, installed-version detection, and better symbol identity. Enabled by default because it substantially improves hover quality.

python-hover.docScraping.markdownDescription: Fetch and structure third-party documentation HTML in the background. Leave this off for a lighter experience, or enable it when you want richer narrative sections, examples, and see-also links in hovers and pinned panels.

python-hover.astFallback.markdownDescription: When the language server returns an incomplete symbol target, use AST-based fallback identification. Enabled by default to improve local chains, literal receivers, and partially resolved names.

python-hover.onlineDiscovery.markdownDescription: Allow PyHover to fetch inventories and docs from the web. Disable this to keep the extension cache-only.

python-hover.warmupImports.description: When online discovery is on, pre-load objects.inv for packages imported in the active editor. Off by default — inventories load on first hover instead.

python-hover.useKnownDocsUrls.description: Use the extension's bundled package→documentation base URL map (faster for popular libs). When false, docs roots come from PyPI project URLs + objects.inv probing + ReadTheDocs-style fallback only.

python-hover.buildFullCorpus.markdownDescription: On the first hover from a package, build that package’s local corpus in the background instead of caching one symbol at a time. Requires `python-hover.onlineDiscovery`.

python-hover.docsVersion.description: Python documentation version. 'auto' detects from your interpreter; or specify e.g. '3.11'.

python-hover.maxSnippetLines.description: Maximum lines shown in hover code snippets.

python-hover.showPracticalExamples.description: Show code examples in hover documentation.

python-hover.requestTimeout.description: HTTP timeout (ms) for fetching documentation pages.

python-hover.cacheTTL.inventoryDays.description: Retention hint for Sphinx inventory downloads. Cached inventory files persist until you clear the PyHover cache.

python-hover.cacheTTL.snippetHours.description: Retention hint for scraped documentation pages. Cached corpus entries persist until you clear the PyHover cache.

enumDescriptions: Open in VS Code side panel
python-hover.docsBrowser.markdownDescription: Where to open official docs links from hovers, pins, and Studio.

enumDescriptions: Open in VS Code side panel
python-hover.devdocsBrowser.markdownDescription: Where to open DevDocs searches from hovers and Studio.

python-hover.customLibraries.description: Custom Sphinx documentation sources. Each entry needs a name and baseUrl; set inventoryUrl when objects.inv lives elsewhere.

inventoryUrl.description: Optional URL to the objects.inv file when it is not served from baseUrl/objects.inv

python-hover.enableDebugLogging.markdownDescription: Enable verbose debug logging and surface richer troubleshooting details in the output channel and debug panels.

python-hover.ui.showSignatures.description: Show function/method signatures at the top of hovers.

python-hover.ui.showReturnTypes.description: Show return type information in hover tooltips.

python-hover.ui.showDebugPinButton.markdownDescription: Show a Debug button in the hover toolbar so users can jump straight into the pinned debug view.

python-hover.ui.showStatusBar.description: Show the PyHover status bar entry for quick actions and cache status.

python-hover.ui.contextMenu.enabled.description: Show PyHover commands in the Python editor context menu.

python-hover.ui.contextMenu.searchDocs.description: Show the Search Docs command in the Python editor context menu.

python-hover.ui.contextMenu.browseModule.description: Show the Browse Module command in the Python editor context menu.

python-hover.ui.contextMenu.pinHover.description: Show the Pin Hover command in the Python editor context menu.

python-hover.ui.contextMenu.debugPinHove.description: Show the Debug Pin Hover command in the Python editor context menu.

python-hover.ui.contextMenu.openStudio.description: Show the Open Studio command in the Python editor context menu.

python-hover.ui.maxContentLength.description: Maximum characters of hover content before truncation with a 'Read more…' link.

python-hover.ui.compactMode.markdownDescription: Show only the signature and first sentence of the description. Overrides `showPracticalExamples`, `showReturnTypes`, and sets a short content length.

python-hover.ui.showBadges.description: Show the badge row (deprecated, async, property, overloaded) in hover tooltips.

python-hover.ui.showMetadataChips.description: Show the metadata chips row under the hover title (kind, source, module, version, badges).

python-hover.ui.showProvenance.description: Show the source provenance line under the hover title so docs origin stays visible at a glance.

python-hover.ui.showToolbar.description: Show the hover action toolbar with the core pin, docs, source, and browse links.

python-hover.ui.showCallouts.description: Show deprecation, update, protocol hint, and note callouts in hovers.

python-hover.ui.showParameters.description: Show the parameters table in hover tooltips.

python-hover.ui.maxParameters.description: Maximum number of parameters shown in the hover parameters table before a 'more in docs' link.

python-hover.ui.showSeeAlso.description: Show the 'See also' section at the bottom of hovers.

python-hover.ui.showRaises.description: Show the 'Raises' section when documentation includes exception information.

python-hover.ui.showModuleExports.description: Show module export lists for import/module hovers.

python-hover.ui.showModuleStats.description: Show module summary stats such as installed version, export count, license, and Python requirement.

python-hover.ui.showFooter.description: Show the compact footer line with import hints for non-local symbols.

python-hover.ui.showImportHints.description: Show import suggestions in the hover footer for non-local symbols.

python-hover.ui.maxExamples.description: Maximum number of examples rendered in a hover before the rest are left in docs.

python-hover.ui.maxModuleExports.description: Maximum number of exported names shown in module hover summaries.

python-hover.ui.maxSeeAlsoItems.description: Maximum number of see-also items shown before the rest stay in docs.

python-hover.ui.showUpdateWarning.description: Show an 'Update available' callout when the installed package is behind the latest PyPI release.

python-hover.ui.moduleBrowser.defaultVie.description: Default module browser view mode when opening indexed modules. Flat is better for dotted method discovery; hierarchy is available when you want path drilldown.

python-hover.ui.moduleBrowser.defaultDen.description: Default card density for the module browser.

python-hover.ui.moduleBrowser.showPrivat.description: Show names that look private or dunder-style by default in the module browser.

python-hover.ui.moduleBrowser.showHierar.description: Show hierarchy and branch hints in the module browser when navigating large modules.

python-hover.ui.moduleBrowser.autoLoadPr.description: Automatically hydrate module browser cards with richer summaries and signatures in the background.

python-hover.ui.moduleBrowser.previewBat.description: How many symbol previews the module browser hydrates per background batch.

python-hover.diagnostics.enabled.description: Show inline warnings for deprecated symbols (squiggles in the editor).

python-hover.hoverActivationDelay.description: Extra delay in ms before PyHover triggers resolution. Useful on slow machines or large projects to reduce unnecessary hover calls. 0 = no delay.

python-hover.preloadPackages.markdownDescription: Package names to pre-warm documentation inventories for on activation, regardless of what file is open (e.g. `["numpy", "pandas"]`). Requires `onlineDiscovery`.

python-hover.excludePatterns.markdownDescription: Glob patterns for files where hover resolution is skipped entirely (e.g. `["**/migrations/**", "**/_generated/**"]`).

scripts.verify: npm run compile && npm run lint && npm run package
